compiled_state.title: hook-drift: portability-check in .pre-commit-config.yaml missing from examples/

comments.body: Classification: mechanical (missing config entry in example file).

comments.body: Fix applied: added portability-check hook entry to examples/pre-commit-config.example.yaml to match .pre-commit-config.yaml. Also updated the timeout header comment.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Reverted: portability-check is intentionally absent from examples/pre-commit-config.example.yaml because it only applies to this project (DSO plugin repo), not to host projects. The hook-drift is by design.
comments.author: Test
